ODK form submission metrics

Source: R/odk_survey_status.R
eri_survey_status.Rd

Returns submission counts and status metadata for one or more ODK Central forms. The scope is determined by the combination of project_id and form_id supplied:

Usage

eri_survey_status(project_id = NULL, form_id = NULL, con = NULL)

Arguments

project_id

int ODK project ID, or NULL for all projects.

form_id

chr ODK form ID, or NULL for all forms in the project.

con

An odk_connection object from init_odk_connection(), or NULL to fall back to the ODK_URL and ODK_TOKEN environment variables.

Value

An S3 object of class c("survey_status", "tbl_df", "tbl", "data.frame") with the following columns:

project_id

int ODK project ID.

project_name

chr ODK project display name.

form_id

chr ODK form ID.

form_name

chr ODK form display name.

server_url

chr ODK server URL.

status

chr "open" or "closed".

total_submissions

int All-time submission count.

last_submission_at

chr ISO 8601 datetime of most recent submission, or NA.

submissions_7d

int Submissions in the last 7 days.

submissions_30d

int Submissions in the last 30 days.

Details

  • Both NULL: all forms across every project visible to the connection.

  • project_id only: all forms within that project.

  • Both supplied: a single form.

Submission counts for the 7-day and 30-day windows are derived by fetching the full submission list and filtering by createdAt.
